name: Paddle
description: Paddle is a complete SaaS billing platform that acts as a merchant of record, handling payments, tax compliance, and subscription management globally. It lets you create products, define pricing, manage subscriptions, and track transactions without worrying about sales tax or VAT collection.

capabilities.name: products_create
capabilities.description: Create a new product in your Paddle catalog.

capabilities.name: products_list
capabilities.description: List all products in your Paddle catalog with filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: products_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific product by its ID.

capabilities.name: products_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing product.

capabilities.name: prices_create
capabilities.description: Create a price for a product, defining amount, currency, and billing cycle.

capabilities.name: prices_list
capabilities.description: List all prices with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: prices_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific price by its ID.

capabilities.name: prices_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing price.

capabilities.name: discounts_create
capabilities.description: Create a discount code that can be applied to transactions.

capabilities.name: discounts_list
capabilities.description: List all discounts with filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: discounts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific discount by ID.

capabilities.name: discounts_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing discount.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create a new customer record in Paddle.

capabilities.name: customers_list
capabilities.description: List all customers with filtering.

capabilities.name: customers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific customer by ID.

capabilities.name: customers_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing customer.

capabilities.name: addresses_create
capabilities.description: Create a billing address for a customer.

capabilities.name: addresses_list
capabilities.description: List all addresses for a customer.

capabilities.name: addresses_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific address for a customer.

capabilities.name: addresses_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing address for a customer.

capabilities.name: businesses_create
capabilities.description: Create a business entity for a customer.

capabilities.name: businesses_list
capabilities.description: List all businesses for a customer.

capabilities.name: businesses_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific business for a customer.

capabilities.name: businesses_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing business for a customer.

capabilities.name: transactions_create
capabilities.description: Create a new transaction for a checkout or invoice.

capabilities.name: transactions_list
capabilities.description: List and filter transactions across your account.

capabilities.name: transactions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific transaction by ID.

capabilities.name: transactions_update
capabilities.description: Update a draft or ready transaction.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_list
capabilities.description: List all subscriptions with filtering.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific subscription by ID.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_update
capabilities.description: Update a subscription, such as changing items or billing details.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an active subscription.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_pause
capabilities.description: Pause an active subscription.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_resume
capabilities.description: Resume a paused subscription.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_charge
capabilities.description: Create a one-time charge on an existing subscription.

capabilities.name: adjustments_create
capabilities.description: Create a credit, refund, or chargeback adjustment for a transaction.

capabilities.name: adjustments_list
capabilities.description: List all adjustments with filtering.

capabilities.name: event_types_list
capabilities.description: List all event types that Paddle can send.

capabilities.name: events_list
capabilities.description: List events that have occurred on your account.

capabilities.name: notification_settings_create
capabilities.description: Create a notification destination for webhooks.

capabilities.name: notification_settings_list
capabilities.description: List all notification settings.

capabilities.name: notification_settings_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific notification setting.

capabilities.name: notification_settings_update
capabilities.description: Update a notification setting.

capabilities.name: notification_settings_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a notification setting.

capabilities.name: notifications_list
capabilities.description: List all notifications sent from your account.

capabilities.name: notifications_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific notification.

capabilities.name: notifications_replay
capabilities.description: Replay a notification, sending it again to the destination.

capabilities.name: pricing_preview
capabilities.description: Preview pricing calculations for given items, including taxes and discounts.
